demographic_audit_note: Verified insurance (Straight Medicare) and compared Atlantis record against facility face sheet; corrected patient's zip code from 19102 to 19104 and added Apartment 4B to the primary address string to ensure HHA and MA find the residence.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker confirms the goal is Home with HHA services for CHF management and diuretic monitoring; patient's daughter is available to provide 24/7 support initially.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2: SW reports patient is stabilizing on intravenous Lasix; Physical Therapy notes progress in gait but recommends DME (rolling walker) for home safety. Target discharge set for Friday.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card inserted into Martha's iPhone contacts under 'Care Team' and physical program flyer delivered to her daughter, Elena, during the Tuesday bedside check-in.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Reached Elena (daughter) 24 hours prior to discharge; home is ready and walker has been delivered, but Elena reported the HHA had not yet confirmed a nurse arrival time due to missing paperwork.
atlantis_final_sync: Entered confirmed discharge date of 10/27 and first visit date of 10/28 into the Atlantis transition module.
ma_visit_booking: MA scheduled for 10/28 at 10:00 AM to coincide with the HHA's projected start-of-care window, ensuring the 'First Visit' incentive is triggered.
narrative_summary: Martha, a 78yo female with CHF, was successfully triaged in Atlantis where her demographics were audited for HHA accuracy. During her maintenance phase, the PN provided education to her daughter and inserted the V-Card to ensure a direct line of communication. Despite a delay triggered by missing physician orders at the time of handoff, the PN facilitated the transition by flagging the gap to the SW and scheduling the MA visit within the mandatory 24-hour window.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA Intake Coordinator reports they cannot process the referral because the physician's home health orders are missing from the packet.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the missing orders to the Social Worker and provided the HHA's direct fax number to ensure the clinical packet was resent.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Flagged the missing orders to the Social Worker and provided the HHA's direct fax number to ensure the clinical packet was resent.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient's daughter expresses confusion about which agency is coming and what time to expect them on Day 1.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Walked the daughter through the Day 1 expectations and provided a physical appointment card with the MA's scheduled time.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Walked the daughter through the Day 1 expectations and provided a physical appointment card with the MA's scheduled time.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis queue reflects an outdated phone number for the patient's primary caregiver.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Updated the contact information in Atlantis after verifying the correct cell number during a bedside visit.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Updated the contact information in Atlantis after verifying the correct cell number during a bedside visit.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Allow the Social Worker to discover the missing HHA orders during their routine end-of-day discharge audit.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW's ownership of the clinical referral packet and avoids over-stepping into the administrative handoff process.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Notify the SW immediately that the HHA intake coordinator is missing the physician orders and confirm when the fax has been successfully sent to keep the MA schedule on track.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Follows the PN checklist for Stage 3: Final Coordination, ensuring all transition providers are aligned without performing the SW's tasks.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Contact the physician's office directly to request a new set of signed orders and fax them to the HHA to ensure the discharge isn't delayed.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This violates the SW boundary by handling clinical documentation and physician communication which is the sole responsibility of the facility staff.
